text.title: IaC PR Review Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the shape of the reviewer's PR-comment output. Subagent must satisfy this before posting.

field.name: overall_verdict
field.constraint: block if any axis verdict == block; request_changes if any == request_changes; else approve

forbidden.pattern: overall_verdict == approve while any per_axis_verdict has verdict == block
comment body without per-axis breakdown (e.g., "LGTM" alone)
verdict == approve for IAM axis when added_permissions contains wildcard "*" on production resources
verdict == approve for state_safety axis when plan output has destroy-and-recreate on stateful resource WITHOUT linked migration ticket
verdict == approve for secrets axis when plaintext-secret detector returned positive
verdict == approve for rollback axis when rollback_plan fields are missing or "revert the commit"

allowed-transformations.transformation: Promote verdict from request_changes to approve only after every blocker has a resolution_resolved entry with timestamp.
Mark per_axis_verdict as "n/a" (not applicable) only with explicit reason — e.g., "no IAM changes in this PR"; n/a is never treated as approve.
Append additional reviewers as co-reviewers without overwriting the primary review.

list.item: All five axes have a verdict, none missing
Overall verdict is consistent with worst per-axis verdict
IAM diff link present whenever IAM changes are detected
Rollback plan fields are concrete (no "revert commit" alone)
Plan output link is reachable + machine-readable
